summary: Russian forces reported an FPV drone strike on an ambulance in Mykolaiv region, wounding the driver and a doctor. In Donetsk, a Russian occupier showed damage to his bike from a Ukrainian FPV drone hit. ZALA Lancet operators successfully struck multiple enemy targets with a single loitering munition despite EW interference. Ukrainian forces hit the Russian frigate "Admiral Essen" in Novorossiysk Bay, damaging its superstructure and electronic warfare systems. The "Rubikon" Center intercepted over 1,500 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs in a single day, destroying 107 targets, while Ukrainian developers unveiled new "Lightning" UAV variants with retargeting capabilities.
